The ideal candidate has experience with Java and JavaScript for UI automation and Java Rest Assured for API testing. Knowledge of CRM systems such as Siebel CRM is a plus but not required.</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></p> <p>Develop and maintain automated UI test scripts using Java and JavaScript.<br>Design, implement, and execute API tests using Java Rest Assured.<br>Conduct automated testing, identify defects, and prepare detailed test reports.<br>Collaborate with development teams to ensure smooth integration of automated tests.<br>Contribute to improving test automation frameworks and processes.<br>(Optional) Use knowledge of CRM systems like Siebel CRM for testing automation.<br>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;<br><strong>Requirements:</strong><br>Experience with UI and API automation using Java and JavaScript.<br>Proficiency with Java Rest Assured for API testing.<br>Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.<br>Knowledge of test automation frameworks and best practices.<br>Good communication skills and teamwork abilities.<br>Preferred Qualifications:<br>Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps processes.<br>Experience with automation tools like Selenium, Cypress, or Postman.<br>Understanding of Agile methodologies.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a
